creator: danilo@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've isolated the mbuf data. Parsing the IP header we have:
Version: 4
Hlen: 5
ToS: 0
Len: 173
Id: 54533
Off: 185
TTL: 52
P: 17
Sum: f4ad
Src: 8.8.8.8
Dst: 172.16.255.179

Curiously, the fragment in the previous panic had the same Length and, I think, the same Offset.
